tasks.content: Update spec header and input description for LangGraph architecture
tasks.description: Update the spec header to reflect the new architecture: LangGraph Python backend replacing BuiltInAgent/Inngest. Update the Input description and any version references.

tasks.content: Rewrite User Story 7: Durable Agent Tasks → LangGraph Persistent Agent Runs
tasks.description: Replace Inngest-based durable execution story with LangGraph checkpointing. The story should describe: persistent agent runs that survive crashes/browser closes, progress visible via checkpoints, pausing/resuming long tasks. Keep the P3 priority and acceptance scenarios format.

tasks.content: Add new User Stories for Multi-Agent Delegation and Memory
tasks.description:
Add two new user stories:
1. Multi-Agent Delegation (P2): Agent A delegates to Agent B via LangGraph sub-graphs. E.g., research agent delegates to code agent.
2. Agent Memory & Recall (P2): Agent stores memories during conversations and recalls them semantically in future conversations via embedding search.
Both should follow the existing story format with Why/Priority/IndependentTest/AcceptanceScenarios.
tasks.activeForm: Adding new User Stories for LangGraph capabilities

tasks.content: Rewrite functional requirements for LangGraph architecture
tasks.description:
Key changes:
- FR-011: Change from CopilotKit BuiltInAgent to LangGraph Python via AG-UI protocol
- FR-035-039: Replace Inngest durable execution with LangGraph checkpointer
- Add new FRs for: multi-agent delegation (LangGraph sub-graphs), agent memory (memories table + embedding search), persistent checkpoints (PostgresSaver)
- Remove any BuiltInAgent and Inngest references
- Keep all other FRs (auth, conversations, workspace, MCP, multi-provider, database)

tasks.content: Update Key Entities, Success Criteria, Assumptions, and Edge Cases
tasks.description:
- Key Entities: Add Checkpoint and Memory entities
- Success Criteria: Update SC-008 for LangGraph checkpointing instead of Inngest; add criteria for multi-agent delegation and memory recall
- Assumptions: Remove Inngest assumption, add LangGraph/Python/AG-UI assumptions
- Edge Cases: Add LangGraph-specific edge cases (checkpoint recovery, agent delegation failures, memory search misses)
tasks.activeForm: Updating Key Entities, Success Criteria, Assumptions, Edge Cases

tasks.content: Validate updated spec against quality checklist
tasks.description: Run the spec quality validation checklist: no implementation details, requirements testable, success criteria measurable and technology-agnostic, all sections complete. Update the checklist file at specs/001-agentic-workspace-rebuild/checklists/requirements.md.
